race.comment: MONTY BE QUICK (8) was caught wide so made an early dash to the lead then capitulated late and finished a close fourth over 2100m at Wyong last start. Grant Buckley takes over today and he won at his only other ride on the six-year-old. Tough campaigner who looks nicely placed to take this out. ROCKBARTON ICON (12) made it three minor placings in a row when close up over 1800m at Port Macquarie last time out. Returns to a happy hunting ground - a win and three placings from four tries over today's track and distance. Looms as a big threat. MIDORI GIANT (3) disappointed here at a similar trip last start after two good runs to kick off this prep. Likes the sting out of the ground so he can bounce back. JACK DUGGAN (2) hasn't saluted for a while but he is capable of winning a race like this if anywhere near his best.
